name: python3-pyasn1-modules
title: python3-pyasn1-modules
summary: Collection of protocols modules written in ASN.1 language (Python 3)
description:
Collection of protocols modules written in ASN.1 language (Python 3)
This is a small but growing collection of ASN.1 data structures
expressed in Python terms using pyasn1 data model.
.
It's thought to be useful to protocol developers and testers.
.
Please note that pyasn1_modules is neither part of the pyasn1 package
nor related to it.
